adminPayments.title: Payments
adminPayments.subtitle: Every transaction on the platform — filter, inspect, and refund.
adminPayments.refundConfirm: Issue a full refund for this payment?

profitShare.title: Profit share
profitShare.subtitle: The platform's commission rate per payment type.
profitShare.notConfigured: Using the default rate (no override set).

financialConfig.title: Financial configuration
financialConfig.subtitle: Platform fee and profit-share rules per payment type. Only one rule is active per type at a time.
financialConfig.empty: No rules yet. Create one to get started.

confirm.activate: Activate this rule? Any rule currently active for the same payment type will be archived.
confirm.deactivate: Deactivate this rule? The payment type will have no active rule until you activate another.
confirm.archive: Archive this rule? Archived rules cannot be edited or reactivated.

form.notesPlaceholder: Why this rule? Recorded in the audit trail.

simulator.title: Calculation preview
simulator.subtitle: Simulate how a gross amount is split before activating a rule.
simulator.fallbackNote: No rule is configured for this payment type — the default rate was used.
simulator.notViableNote: The platform take exceeds the gross amount — the payee balance would be negative.

toast.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

validation.feePercentage: Enter a fee percentage between 0 and 100.
validation.feeAmount: Enter a fixed fee greater than zero.
validation.profitShare: Enter a profit share between 0 and 100.
validation.grossAmount: Enter a gross amount greater than zero.

billing.title: Billing
billing.subtitle: Your review payments and the payouts you have received.
billing.paymentsDisabledBanner: Payments are disabled platform-wide. New scholarships are free for students; no new transactions are processing. Existing records below are read-only history.

earnings.title: Earnings
earnings.subtitle: Your booking income, the platform's share, and the payouts that have reached your account.
earnings.setupPayoutsBody: Connect your bank account through Stripe to receive automatic deposits from your bookings.
earnings.setupPayoutsError: Could not initiate Stripe onboarding. Please try again.
earnings.totalEarnedHint: What you keep after the platform fee.
earnings.totalGrossHint: What students paid in total — before fees.
earnings.totalFeesHint: Total deducted by the platform across captured payments.
earnings.awaitingPayoutHint: Captured earnings that haven't been deposited yet.
earnings.paymentsSubtitle: Each booking shows the gross amount, the platform fee, and your net share.
earnings.payoutsSubtitle: Bank deposits that bundle multiple paid bookings.
earnings.noPayments: No payments yet — they appear once a student authorises a booking with you.
earnings.noPayouts: No payouts yet — once captured earnings clear the holding period, they're deposited here.

reviewRequest.studentSubtitle: Paid application-support requests you've sent to companies. ScholarPath authorises your card up-front and only captures the fee once the company accepts.
reviewRequest.studentEmpty: You haven't started any paid review requests yet.
reviewRequest.scholarshipProviderSubtitle: Accept to capture the held payment and start the service. Reject to release the hold without charging the student.
reviewRequest.cancelConfirm50: Cancelling now triggers a 50% refund — the remaining 50% is retained. Continue?
reviewRequest.rejectPrompt: Optional reason for rejecting this request (leave blank to skip):
